basics.name: Alexander R. Pico
basics.label: Biomedical Researcher & Bioinformatician
basics.summary: Faculty bioinformatician at the Gladstone Institutes with expertise in network biology, pathway analysis, and open-source scientific software. Developer of Cytoscape apps and WikiPathways tools used across the biomedical research community.

work.name: Gladstone Institutes
work.summary: Lead bioinformatics infrastructure and collaborative research projects at a premier biomedical research institute affiliated with UCSF.
highlights: Develop and maintain open-source bioinformatics tools for network biology
Collaborate with experimental labs on multi-omics data analysis
Mentor graduate students and postdoctoral researchers

education.institution: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
